description: Canonical pulse-echo flaw-detector A-scan: steel bezel w/ knobs + RANGE/VEL/GAIN chips, 10x5 graticule, initial pulse hard left, flaw echo at 50 mm mid-sweep, strong back-wall echo at 90 mm, grass baseline, 0-100 MM ruler under the sweep. Build: grid powers up, CRT trace sweeps L-to-R, IP, flaw echo + ping, BW, ruler lights with amber 50 mm drop-line (time = distance).
